name: revpro
description: Nginx reverse proxy manager with Let's Encrypt and HTTP/3 support
author: Martin Skalicky

help.description: Manages nginx reverse proxy site configurations. Generates per-site configs from a site-configs.conf template, integrates Let's Encrypt certificates, supports HTTP/3 and Authentik auth-proxy. Bundles TLS helpers (cert inspection, self-signed cert generation) and an HTTP/2,3 checker.

options.description: Generate per-site nginx configs from site-configs.conf
Append a site and generate+reload it
Reload or restart the reverseproxy container
Wipe and recreate conf/ and logs/
Create the folder structure / open the config
Generate a self-signed root CA + server cert

examples.description: Show a live cert's expiry and issuer
